register.approvalNoticeBody: After registering, your account will be reviewed by the Management Board. You'll be notified of the result by phone or email. The review process may take 1–2 business days.

hero.subtitle: An automated, safe, and efficient management solution for parking operators, and an easier parking experience for every resident and staff member.
hero.dailyEntries: Over {{count}} entries and exits every day

stats.title: Parking Status Overview
stats.subtitle: Real-time tracking helps you stay on top of the building's current parking status.

vehicles.title: Supported Vehicles
vehicles.subtitle: A specialized program optimized for each vehicle type when registering.

pricing.title: Official Pricing
pricing.subtitle: We're a professional operator, not a budget lot. Pricing is calculated automatically and flexibly by the hour/minute through the management system.
pricing.footnote: *Prices may vary during holidays or based on parking duration.

guidelines.title: Operating Rules & Guidelines
guidelines.intro: To ensure safety and smooth operation of the building, please follow the parking facility's rules...
guidelines.cameraNotice: The facility is monitored 24/7 by smart AI cameras and an automatic fire suppression system.

items.speedLimit: Observe the maximum speed limit of 10km/h within the parking area.
items.parkingLines: Park within the marked lines and avoid blocking shared walkways or other vehicles.
items.turnOffEngine: Turn off your engine immediately after parking, and don't leave flammable materials in your vehicle.
items.payOnTime: Pay parking fees on time for monthly passes; for single visits, pay before exiting.
items.noSmoking: Smoking, littering, and disorderly conduct are prohibited throughout the parking area.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.greeting: Hi {{name}}, here is your system overview.

users.title: User management
users.notFoundHint: Try changing the filters or search term.
users.emailCantChange: Email cannot be changed after the account is created.
users.dateHint: Staff must be at least 18 at the hire date. You can click the calendar or type the date directly.
users.systemCantEdit: This is a system account (walk-in guest) and cannot be edited.
users.systemCantLock: This is a system account (walk-in guest) and cannot be locked.
users.validateDatesRequired: Staff/Manager roles require a date of birth and hire date.
users.validateUnder18: The user must be at least 18 at the hire date to hold a Staff/Manager role.
users.errLoad: Could not load the user list

parkingConfig.title: Parking Setup
parkingConfig.capacityInfo: Each zone has a maximum capacity (the number you set) and an actual slot count (slots already created). A 5 / 10 bar means 5 slots created out of a maximum of 10. To add a slot, click Add slot; when full, raise the zone capacity first.
parkingConfig.noBuildingsHint: Create a building on the Facilities page first, then come back here.
parkingConfig.selectBuildingHint: Manage floors, zones and slots inside the selected building.
parkingConfig.noZones: This floor has no zones yet.
parkingConfig.vehicleCantChange: Cannot change if the zone already has slots of another type.
parkingConfig.zoneHint: Maximum capacity is the slot limit. Create actual slots in "Manage slots" after saving the zone.
parkingConfig.confirmDeleteFloor: Delete {{name}}? The floor must have no zones inside.
parkingConfig.confirmDeleteZone: Delete zone "{{name}}"? The zone must have no slots inside.
parkingConfig.noSlotsHint: Use the "Add one slot" or "Add in bulk" tab.
parkingConfig.slotCodeHint: The code must be unique system-wide. Vehicle type is auto-assigned by the zone ({{vehicle}}).
parkingConfig.zoneFull: Zone is full ({{actual}}/{{total}}). Raise the capacity via "Edit zone" before adding.
parkingConfig.bulkPreviewHint: Enter a prefix and number range to preview.

errors.SLOT_CODE_TOO_LONG: Slot code must be at most 20 characters.
errors.ZONE_CAPACITY_FULL: The zone is full. Raise the capacity before adding slots.
errors.VEHICLE_TYPE_MISMATCH: The slot's vehicle type must match the zone's allowed type.
errors.SLOT_IN_USE: Cannot delete a slot that is occupied or reserved.
errors.SLOT_HAS_ACTIVE_SESSION: The slot has an active parking session and cannot be deleted.
errors.SLOT_HAS_RESERVATION: The slot has an active reservation and cannot be deleted.
errors.SLOT_HAS_HISTORY: The slot has parking history. Set it to Blocked instead of deleting.
errors.ZONE_HAS_SLOTS: Cannot delete the zone because it still has slots.
errors.ZONE_NAME_EXISTS: Zone name already exists on this floor.
errors.ZONE_HAS_OTHER_VEHICLE_SLOTS: Cannot change the vehicle type because the zone has slots of another type.
errors.TOTAL_SLOTS_BELOW_ACTUAL: The new capacity is below the actual slot count. Remove some slots first.
errors.FLOOR_HAS_ZONES: Cannot delete the floor because it still has zones.
errors.FLOOR_NAME_EXISTS: Floor name already exists in this building.
errors.BUILDING_HAS_FLOORS: Cannot delete the building because it still has floors.
errors.DOB_HIREDATE_REQUIRED: Staff/Manager roles require a date of birth and hire date.
errors.UNDER_MIN_AGE: The user is under 18 at the hire date.
errors.SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_PROTECTED: This is a system account and cannot be edited or have its role changed.
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email before signing in. Check your inbox.
errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired, please sign in again.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired, please sign in again.

report.title: Report Incident
report.issuesDesc: Please select the category that best matches your issue
report.relatedDesc: Select the session or reservation affected by this incident
report.descSub: Provide more details so we can help you faster
report.descPlaceholder: Describe your issue here. Example: I paid but the gate didn't open, the app reported the wrong fee...
report.attachSub: Upload evidence photos like receipts, error screens or vehicle location
report.attachHint: Accepts JPG, PNG. Max 5MB per file. Up to 5 files.
report.attachInvalid: Only JPG/PNG images accepted, max 5MB per file.
report.attachNote: * The system currently stores attachment filenames in the database. To upload real images, a separate upload API is required.
report.infoHint: Your report will be saved to the database and sent to the operations team. Initial status is Open.
report.noneWarning: You need at least one active parking session or reservation to submit an incident report.
report.validateDesc: Please describe the issue more clearly, at least 5 characters.

booking.title: Create new booking
booking.subtitle: Choose time in Vietnam time zone; available slots are loaded directly from the database.
booking.infoDesc: The start time will auto-track current time + 15 minutes if you haven't picked a later time.
booking.autoUpdateHint: If you leave the start time at the earliest mark, the system auto-increments to keep it valid.
booking.aiHint: ✨ Slots marked with a star are AI-recommended to save you search time.
booking.noSlotsFilter: No slots match the current filter.
booking.note1: Start time auto-updates if left at the earliest mark.
booking.note2: A booking only expires when EndTime is less than the SQL Server current time.
booking.note3: When staff checks in, the vehicle moves to the current parking session.
booking.errTimeAdjusted: Start time has been auto-updated to be at least 15 minutes from now.
booking.errLoadSlots: Could not load available slots from the database.
booking.errReconfirm: Booking time has been updated. Please press confirm again.
booking.errNoSlot: Please select an available parking slot.
booking.errNoReservationId: Booking succeeded but no reservation ID was returned to navigate to confirmation.

faqs.q: How do I cancel a booking?
faqs.a: You can cancel a booking from the 'Booking history' page at least 30 minutes before the scheduled check-in time to avoid a fee.

faqs.q: Can I change my license plate?
faqs.a: Yes, please go to 'Settings' or 'My profile' to update your license plate.

faqs.q: How do I get a VAT invoice?
faqs.a: The VAT invoice is sent automatically to your email once payment is completed.
You can check your slot location directly in the app under 'Current parking session'.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Body: By registering for and using the services of the Parking Building Management System (PBMS), you agree to comply with the rules and conditions set out in this document.
terms.section2Item1: You must park in the assigned spot (for pre-booked vehicles) or as directed by parking staff.
terms.section2Item2: Do not leave valuable belongings in your vehicle. Management is not responsible for any loss of personal property left inside vehicles.
terms.section2Item3: Observe the maximum speed limit of 5km/h within the parking area and use low-beam headlights.
terms.section3Body: The system supports payment via electronic gateways and cash. Bookings must be cancelled at least 30 minutes before the check-in time to avoid a compensation fee.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect your personal information when you use the PBMS smart parking system.
privacy.section1Intro: We only collect the information necessary to manage the parking facility, including:
privacy.section1Item1: Account information: full name, email, phone number.
privacy.section1Item2: Vehicle information: license plate, vehicle type.
privacy.section1Item3: Parking history data and license plate images automatically captured at the entry/exit gates.
privacy.section2Body: Your data is used solely for automatic gate authentication, recording entry/exit times for accurate fee calculation, and ensuring the security of your vehicle.
privacy.section3Body: We apply SSL/TLS encryption standards to protect data in transit. Payment card data is not stored directly on our servers but is handled through PCI-DSS compliant payment partners.

payment.title: Parking payment
payment.subtitle: Select a vehicle to pay and get a bank-transfer QR code
payment.noSessionsHint: A parking session appears after Staff checks your vehicle in.
payment.surchargeBody: The vehicle stayed longer after prepayment. Additional amount due:

payment.qrHint: Open your banking app → QR / Scan → scan the code
payment.showPricing: View fee table by vehicle type
payment.prepayNoteBody: The fee is calculated at this moment. If the vehicle stays longer, staff will collect a surcharge on exit.
payment.qrGuide1: Open your banking app (MB Bank, VCB, Techcombank...)
payment.qrGuide4: Check the amount and the transfer note
payment.qrGuide5: Confirm — the system updates within seconds
payment.doneBody: Your vehicle has been recorded. Please head to the gate for staff confirmation.
payment.doneNoteBody: This is a prepayment confirmation. If the vehicle stays longer, staff will collect a surcharge on exit.
payment.failBody: The order was cancelled or expired after 15 minutes.

paymentResult.successBody: Recorded. Please head to the gate for staff confirmation.
paymentResult.cancelBody: The payment was cancelled. You can try again anytime.
paymentResult.prepayNoteBody: The fee is calculated at the time of payment. If the vehicle stays longer, staff will collect a surcharge on exit.
